summary: Phase 1 B2B marketplace features fully tested. All backend APIs and frontend components working correctly.

warnings.issue: React warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component (BrowserRouter inside AdminLogin)
warnings.impact: No functional impact, login works correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Seller create with auto-generated seller_code (LS-XXXXX format)
Backend: Seller is_active toggle (activate/deactivate)
Backend: GET /sellers filters inactive sellers by default
Backend: GET /sellers?include_inactive=true shows all sellers
Backend: Article create with auto-generated article_code (ART-XXXXX format)
Backend: Article CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend: Fabric create with inventory fields (quantity_available, rate_per_meter, dispatch_timeline, is_bookable)
Backend: Fabric update inventory fields
Backend: Fabric create with denim fields (weft_shrinkage, stretch_percentage)
Backend: Fabric article_id linking to parent article
Backend: Article variant_count updates when fabrics are linked
Backend: GET /articles/{id}/variants returns linked fabrics
Backend: Fabric seller_sku field
Backend: Stats endpoint returns articles count
Backend: Stats endpoint returns active_sellers count
Backend: Stats endpoint returns bookable_fabrics count
Frontend: Admin Dashboard displays all 7 stat cards including Articles, Active Sellers, Bookable
Frontend: Admin Articles page loads with article list showing article_code and variant_count
Frontend: Admin Sellers page displays seller_code (LS-XXXXX)
Frontend: Admin Sellers page has is_active toggle button
Frontend: Admin Sellers page has 'Show inactive' checkbox
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form has Inventory & Booking section
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form has Quantity Available field
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form has Rate per meter field
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form has Dispatch Timeline field
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form has Enable direct booking checkbox
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form has Seller SKU field
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form has Article select dropdown
Frontend: Admin Fabrics form shows Denim Specifications section when Denim category selected
Frontend: Denim section has Weft Shrinkage % and Stretch % fields
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 B2B features complete: Sellers have seller_code (LS-XXXXX) and is_active toggle. Articles have article_code (ART-XXXXX) and link to fabrics via article_id. Fabrics have inventory fields (quantity_available, rate_per_meter, dispatch_timeline, is_bookable), denim fields (weft_shrinkage, stretch_percentage), and seller_sku. Stats endpoint returns articles, active_sellers, bookable_fabrics.
